rationale: The cited paper appears in an introductory grouped citation (footnote 1) used to support a general claim that strategic interactions in concentrated industries are well documented. The citing article does not separately discuss Vitorino (2012)'s model, identification approach, data, or results when developing its own empirical strategy, mechanism tests, or simulations. Since the reference functions as broad background rather than a specific input to the paper's argument, this is a passing mention.
